_comment: Copy to calibre_gui_config.json and edit for your site/PDK. Every value can also be set via the in-browser Config tab or an environment variable (CDS_LIB, LAYERMAP, DRC_DECK, EDA_MODULES, ...). Paths below are placeholders.
_comment_lvs_src: LVS source netlist (schematic -> CDL). If a <cell>.src.net/.cdl is found it is reused; otherwise it is generated. netlist_mode: si (default, Cadence auCDL via si.env) | skill (virtuoso -nograph) | custom (netlist_cmd) | off. netlist_view is the SCHEMATIC view (not the layout view).
